title: Codon Table Manifest
description: Schema for FactorForge codon table provenance manifest files.

codon_table_id.description: Unique identifier for this codon table version.

species.description: Full scientific name of the organism.

ncbi_taxid.description: NCBI Taxonomy ID for the organism. N. benthamiana = 4100.

file.description: Relative path (from repo root) to the codon table JSON file.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the codon table file.

source_label.description: Human-readable description of the data source.

build_path_status.description: Whether the authoritative build path (script + inputs) is available and verified.

authoritative_build_script_available.description: Whether an authoritative, verified build script exists for reproducing this codon table.

known_limitations.description: List of known limitations or caveats about this codon table.

not_authoritative_build_scripts.description: Scripts that exist in the repo but are NOT the authoritative builder for this codon table.

reason.description: Why this script is not the authoritative builder.

planned_rebuild.description: Planned future rebuild of this codon table.

target_version.description: Target FactorForge version for the rebuild.

target_reference.description: Target genome/database reference for the rebuild.

expected_effect.description: Expected impact of the rebuild on scores and results.

claim_boundary.description: Explicit statement of what this codon table can and cannot claim.

asset_type.description: Governance status of this codon-reference asset (added in v3.3.0 reference-policy update — reference-policy audit).

isoform_policy.description: Isoform selection policy used when building this table from source CDS records.

terminal_stop_policy.description: Whether stop-codon (*) frequencies are part of this table's frequency model (added in v3.3.0 reference-policy update — reference-policy audit).

promotion_note.description: Notes on promotion history/criteria for this asset (e.g. when experimental_candidate -> official_packaged).
